states.title: Ready
states.summary: Package is ready for automatic or manual start.

modes.title: Manual
modes.summary: Manual lane is active for commissioning.

transition_guards.title: Allow Start Running
transition_guards.summary: Run start is allowed only when package permissives are clear and no interlock is active.

inhibits.title: Suction Blocked
inhibits.summary: Suction path inhibit remains clear on the ready baseline.

diagnostic_summaries.title: Ready Path
diagnostic_summaries.summary: Protection baseline is clear and package is ready.

recovery_requests.title: Request Recovery
recovery_requests.summary: Recovery request is available on the ready baseline.

ownership_lanes.title: Manual Owner
ownership_lanes.summary: Manual ownership lane is available but not active.

ownership_lanes.title: Remote Owner
ownership_lanes.summary: Remote ownership lane is available but denied for reset.

ownership_lanes.title: Service Owner
ownership_lanes.summary: Service ownership lane is available for maintenance use.

command_lanes.title: Reset From Remote
command_lanes.summary: Remote reset is denied because automatic ownership has authority.

command_lanes.title: Stop In Manual
command_lanes.summary: Manual stop is superseded by the accepted auto start request.

command_lanes.title: Stop In Service
command_lanes.summary: Service stop is blocked until the maintenance window opens.

command_summary.title: Command Summary
command_summary.summary: Automatic ownership remains active while blocked, denied, and superseded command outcomes stay explicit.

authority_holders.title: Manual Holder
authority_holders.summary: Manual holder can request local handover.

authority_holders.title: Remote Holder
authority_holders.summary: Remote holder is visible but not currently requested.

authority_holders.title: Service Holder
authority_holders.summary: Service holder is available for maintenance takeover.

handover_summary.title: Override Summary
handover_summary.summary: Automatic authority is active while a manual takeover remains available.

handover_requests.title: Manual Takeover
handover_requests.summary: Local manual handover is available from the panel lane.

handover_requests.title: Remote Release
handover_requests.summary: Remote release is denied because the automatic holder remains authoritative.

handover_requests.title: Return To Auto
handover_requests.summary: Return-to-auto stays available as the package-neutral fallback.

handover_requests.title: Service Takeover
handover_requests.summary: Service takeover is blocked until the maintenance window is open.
